doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The substantive position contradicts established EDPB/CJEU doctrine on relative identifiability, and the cited reference, supersession, and 2014 guidance number do not correspond to real EDPB documents.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The position contradicts established EDPB/CJEU doctrine (Breyer, EDPS v SRB) on relative identifiability and the cited supersession and reference number do not match real EDPB outputs.
